name: Metropolitan Bank & Trust Company
summary: Metropolitan Bank & Trust Company, together with its subsidiaries, provides various commercial and investment banking products and services in the Philippines, rest of Asia, the United States, and Europe. The company's Consumer Banking segment offers consumer type loans and support for the sourcing and generation of consumer business. Its Corporate Banking segment engages in handling loans and other credit facilities; and offers deposit and current accounts for corporate and institutional customers. The company's Investment Banking segment provides structured finance; services relating to privatizations, initial public offerings, and mergers and acquisitions; and advisory services to individuals and institutions. Its Treasury segment offers money market, trading, and treasury services. The company's Branch Banking segment handles branch deposits, as well as provides loans and other loan related products for middle market clients. Its Others segment offers remittances, leasing, account financing, and other support services. The company also provides trade finance, thrift banking, foreign fund transfer, foreign exchange, online and mobile banking, collateral, and trust services. It operates through a network of 706 branches and 1,774 automated teller machines. The company was incorporated in 1962 and is headquartered in Makati City, the Philippines.
